entities.name: INTERNATIONAL AGRICULTURAL RESEARCH
entities.description: Research aimed at improving productivity in developing countries with spill-over effects on developed countries

entities.name: PRODUCTIVITY
entities.description: The efficiency of agricultural production, which international research aims to increase

entities.name: DEVELOPING COUNTRIES
entities.description: Regions that are the primary target of international agricultural research

entities.name: DEVELOPED COUNTRIES
entities.description: Regions that experience spill-over effects from agricultural research in developing countries

entities.name: WORLD PRICE
entities.description: The global market price of tradeable commodities affected by research-driven supply changes

entities.name: AUSTRALIA
entities.description: A developed country that utilizes genetic materials from ICRISAT to increase productivity

entities.name: COST-REDUCING RESEARCH
entities.description: Research focused on reducing production costs for specific crops

entities.name: SORGHUM
entities.description: A crop that was the subject of cost-reducing research at ICRISAT

entities.name: CHICKPEAS
entities.description: A crop that was the subject of cost-reducing research at ICRISAT

entities.name: ICRISAT
entities.description: The International Crops Research Institute for the Semi-Arid Tropics, which develops and distributes genetic materials

entities.name: GENETIC MATERIALS
entities.description: Agricultural materials developed by ICRISAT and used to increase productivity in Australia

entities.name: WELFARE
entities.description: The net economic benefit or loss for producers and consumers

entities.name: REST OF THE WORLD
entities.description: The global region excluding Australia used for welfare analysis
